description_long: This is a futuristic, twin-engine airplane with a compact, aggressive design and a military or sci-fi aesthetic. The fuselage is streamlined and features a forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a clear canopy, likely for a single pilot. The wings are mid-mounted and swept back, with prominent red accents on the outer sections and additional winglets or stabilizers extending downward. The engines are mounted on either side of the fuselage, each with visible intakes and exhausts, and the nose is equipped with what appear to be weapon-like protrusions, suggesting a combat or tactical role. The tail section features a twin vertical stabilizer configuration, with horizontal stabilizers connecting them. The surface is finished in a camouflage pattern with weathered textures, giving it a rugged, battle-worn appearance.
description: A compact, twin-engine, swept-wing airplane with a forward cockpit, red-accented wings, and a rugged, camouflaged finish. It features twin vertical stabilizers and weapon-like nose details.
description_view_0: Front view showing the twin engines, forward cockpit canopy, and weapon-like nose details, with swept wings and red accents visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the mid-mounted, swept-back wings, downward winglets, and the profile of the cockpit and engines.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the twin vertical stabilizers, horizontal tailplane, and the exhausts of the engines, with the full wingspan visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with clear visibility of the winglets and the camouflaged surface.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing, swept-back wings with downward-angled winglets and slight anhedral angle; no visible high-lift devices.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted on either side of the fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Twin vertical stabilizers with a horizontal stabilizer connecting them, forming an H-tail configuration.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle landing gear with two main units and one nose gear visible.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single-seat canopy integrated into the fuselage.
